features: PERFECT FOR TEENAGER BIRTHDAY GIFTS: Make their first teenage birthday present extra-special with these attractive, versatile and robust black rope handled black paper 13th birthday gift bags featuring a fun warning teenager birthday design! Perfect for wrapping a wide variety of birthday gifts for him or her
MADE IN UK: from recycled material and fully recyclable paper. Ideal for a luxurious alternative to plastic bags! CHOOSE FROM 3 COLOURS: Black, White or Grey
STURDY ROPE HANDLES: The teenager birthday gift bag also features stout rope handles and will hold a substantial amount of weight. The Handles are also recyclable apart from the plastic end

EXTRA STRONG: Paper thickness approx 230 micron. The stiff matte paper design is surprisingly strong and can carry lots of teenager birthday gift ideas such as sweets, books, ornaments, clothing, jewellery, perfume and many other birthday gift accessories for boys and girls
SIZE: Small Bags: Width 12 cm (4.7 inches), Length 16cm (6.3 inches), Depth 7.5cm (2.95 inches). NOTE: Please see images for scale to make sure this is the right size bag for your gifts
